info.description:
A robust and scalable attendance management API built with Go, Gin Gonic, and GORM.
Featuring role-based access control, tenant management, and integration with PostgreSQL and Redis.
This project includes comprehensive user features, attendance tracking, overtime management, and user activity logs.
info.title: Go Attendance API

get.description: Get combined recent activities for the logged-in user
Get attendance list with filter & pagination

post.description: Record clock-in / clock-out with face & location

get.description: Get summary of today's attendance with comparison
Get today's attendance status for the logged-in user

post.description: Authenticate user and get JWT via session cookie
Invalidate current session and clear cookie
Register a new user with employee role by default

get.description: Get leave history for the logged-in user
Get current year leave balances for the logged-in user

post.description: Upload image file and store metadata to database

get.description: Get settings for the current tenant

put.description: Update settings for the current tenant

get.description: Get list of all tenants (SuperAdmin only)
Get detailed information about a specific tenant
Get list of users with filter, sorting, pagination, and dynamic includes

post.description: Create new user with role hierarchy (SuperAdmin can create any, Admin can create HR/Employee)

get.description: Get authenticated user profile from token with optional includes
Get recent activities for the logged-in user
Get all pending change requests for the tenant
